# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Car Key Service DXB — robots.txt
# Static fallback for edge cases where the Next.js /robots route doesn't serve.
# The canonical robots rules are generated by src/app/robots.ts
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/

Sitemap: https://locksmith-dubai.com/sitemap.xml
Host: https://locksmith-dubai.com
